examples: The next really important thing is the smallness of Judea.
It is not because of my smallness. It is because I do not like such kind of character.
Well, they were honest eyes, he concluded, and in them was neither smallness nor meanness.
There is a peace about the place, having to do with smallness, open space, little traffic.
Yet, alone among the armed services, the Coast Guard suffers from smallness rather than gigantism.
